name: aitx-newsletter-digest-scraper-demo
title: AITX Newsletter Digest Scraper (Demo)
description: Demo Actor for the AITX Community Newsletter Pipeline. Scrapes articles from RSS feeds and direct URLs, and events from Lu.ma and Meetup, outputting a unified dataset. This is Actor 1 of a 2-actor pipeline demo built with Claude Code.

meta.purpose: Demo of a multi-actor newsletter pipeline for the AI/TX community
meta.pipeline: Actor 1 of 2 — data collection and scraping stage
